shadcn-html / tag

JS

Tag

A dismissible label for categorization and filtering. Like a badge, but with an optional remove button.

Component Specification — components/tag/tag.md

Native basis

<span> element containing text and an optional dismiss <button>.

Variants (data-variant)

defaultPrimary background, high emphasis secondarySecondary background, medium emphasis outlineBorder only, low emphasis

Default

High emphasis tags with primary background.

React TypeScript CSS 
<span class="tag" data-variant="default">
  React
  <button class="tag-dismiss" aria-label="Remove React">
    <svg>...</svg>
  </button>
</span>

Secondary

Medium emphasis with secondary background.

Design Frontend Backend 
<span class="tag" data-variant="secondary">
  Design
  <button class="tag-dismiss" aria-label="Remove Design">
    <svg>...</svg>
  </button>
</span>

<!-- Without dismiss button -->
<span class="tag" data-variant="secondary">Backend</span>

Outline

Low emphasis with border only.

bug feature docs 
<span class="tag" data-variant="outline">
  bug
  <button class="tag-dismiss" aria-label="Remove bug">
    <svg>...</svg>
  </button>
</span>

In a Card

Tags composed with .card for a metadata display pattern.

Design System

Components for building UIs

HTML CSS JavaScript Accessibility

Full specification → components/tag/tag.md
